create_task_list: create a todo list with tasks marked as pending for a new session
update_task_status: update the status of a todo item from pending to in_progress or completed
read_current_todos: read the current todo list and display all tasks with their status icons
clear_todo_list: clear all todos by passing an empty list to reset the session task tracker
track_task_progress: track task progress by showing completed count and currently in progress items
